name: Ambler, Harry Atwood
description: It has been a toss-up for the past year to know whether he was a Senior or a member of the Faculty and it looks more like the latter. Besides teaching chemistry, he has devoted much of his spare time to the duties of business manager of the Rollamo and as president of Senior class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: It has been a toss-up for the past year to know whether he was a Senior or a member of the Faculty and it looks more like the latter. Besides teaching chemistry, he has devoted much of his spare time to the duties of business manager of the Rollamo and as president of Senior class.

name: Arnold, Emmet Lee
description: Arnold dropped in on us as an unostentatious acquisition from Drury and buckled down seriously to the business of getting a B.S. Of late we have heard strange tales of his escapades in Rolla. Rivals Col. Woods when it comes to dancing. Is also famous for his military maneuvers in Jimtown and Springfield. Loves Geology department.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Arnold dropped in on us as an unostentatious acquisition from Drury and buckled down seriously to the business of getting a B.S. Of late we have heard strange tales of his escapades in Rolla. Rivals Col. Woods when it comes to dancing. Is also famous for his military maneuvers in Jimtown and Springfield. Loves Geology department.

name: Barton, Joseph C.
description: He came from Montgomery City, Mo., but has since transported his interests to Rolla where they (Joe and his wife) now reside. He is a Miner in the true sense of the word, and is Forbes' right-hand man. Joe is also an athlete, having received his M in track.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He came from Montgomery City, Mo., but has since transported his interests to Rolla where they (Joe and his wife) now reside. He is a Miner in the true sense of the word, and is Forbes' right-hand man. Joe is also an athlete, having received his M in track.

name: Bock, James Henry
description: Little Jimmy weighs about 200 and is an all-around man. Football M, Athletic Editor of the Rollamo, Assistant two years in shop and one in Geology, Tau Beta Pi, and still finds time to spend every week-end in St. James. Claims Muskogee, Oklahoma, as his home, but is fond of telling stories about Cobalt and the wild North. See Herivel's writeup.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Little Jimmy weighs about 200 and is an all-around man. Football M, Athletic Editor of the Rollamo, Assistant two years in shop and one in Geology, Tau Beta Pi, and still finds time to spend every week-end in St. James. Claims Muskogee, Oklahoma, as his home, but is fond of telling stories about Cobalt and the wild North. See Herivel's writeup.

name: Martin, F. Bowles
description: Passes either as Martin or Jo and hails from East St. Louis. Can do things without making a fuss about it. Sports a wonderful set of whiskers but is very modest.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Passes either as Martin or Jo and hails from East St. Louis. Can do things without making a fuss about it. Sports a wonderful set of whiskers but is very modest.

name: John, S. Brown
clubs: Two years on the Student Council
description: Brownie originated in Barton County, Missouri, but now claims dear old Rolla for his home. Used to try to combine the occupation of a grind with the vocation of a poet but has since become an all-around assistant and understudy to Dake.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Brownie originated in Barton County, Missouri, but now claims dear old Rolla for his home. Used to try to combine the occupation of a grind with the vocation of a poet but has since become an all-around assistant and understudy to Dake.

name: Crawford, Thomas Ralph
description: A recruit from Kansas School of Mines who came to us in his Junior year. Signs up from Paola. Has been pretty well occupied keeping up to schedule but still has time to be a good fellow. Delights in Economic Geology. Ruined a Stetson at Powell's barn.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A recruit from Kansas School of Mines who came to us in his Junior year. Signs up from Paola. Has been pretty well occupied keeping up to schedule but still has time to be a good fellow. Delights in Economic Geology. Ruined a Stetson at Powell's barn.

name: Cooper, Richard Dwyer
motto: "Now, Mr. Cooper, will you please make that noise like a Ford?" Honk! Honk!
description: Cooper divides his time between attending school and taking care of the library. Is one of the cohort from that big city east of us where they have street cars and automobiles.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Now, Mr. Cooper, will you please make that noise like a Ford?" Honk! Honk!
Cooper divides his time between attending school and taking care of the library. Is one of the cohort from that big city east of us where they have street cars and automobiles.

name: Ralph, Dale
major: MINING ENGINEERING, Mucker, A. I. M. E.
description: The sun is always shining with "Rats" and a moving picture of him during Steam Lab would be the same as a time exposure. He destroyed what was perhaps the best facial adornment in the class all because of a feminine visitor St. Pat's day.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The sun is always shining with "Rats" and a moving picture of him during Steam Lab would be the same as a time exposure. He destroyed what was perhaps the best facial adornment in the class all because of a feminine visitor St. Pat's day.

name: Dolman, Phillips Brooks
major: MINING ENGINEERING, Engineers, A. I. M. E.
description: P. B. claims St. Jo, Buchanan County, as his legal residence but makes his home 'most anywhere. Has the distinction of having taken the Junior trip all by his lonesome. Is an expert on train schedules and box-car accommodations.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: P. B. claims St. Jo, Buchanan County, as his legal residence but makes his home 'most anywhere. Has the distinction of having taken the Junior trip all by his lonesome. Is an expert on train schedules and box-car accommodations.

name: Eames, Fred L.
description: Fred joined us in his Senior year, coming here from Washington U. Is art assistant to Housie and takes keen delight in drawing cartoons of the Faculty. Main hobby is geology.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Fred joined us in his Senior year, coming here from Washington U. Is art assistant to Housie and takes keen delight in drawing cartoons of the Faculty. Main hobby is geology.

name: Ebneyer, Gerard Ernest
motto: "Meester Ebnreyer, I fear these boxes are—"
description: Woof! Woof! Eb never fails to make a noise when invited or encouraged. A true "Irish" son of the Kaiser who claims Chicago, lives in Rolla, and treasures spicy reminiscences of life in Milwaukee. Loves to fuss the Four Hundred.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Meester Ebnreyer, I fear these boxes are—"
Woof! Woof! Eb never fails to make a noise when invited or encouraged. A true "Irish" son of the Kaiser who claims Chicago, lives in Rolla, and treasures spicy reminiscences of life in Milwaukee. Loves to fuss the Four Hundred.

name: Frank S. Elfred, Jr.
description: Quit his other interests to join the benedicts in the middle of his Junior year and then quit school, but thought better of it and returned this year. Always ready to spread something. Hopes to graduate on E's.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Oh, Stillman, is supper ready yet?"
Quit his other interests to join the benedicts in the middle of his Junior year and then quit school, but thought better of it and returned this year. Always ready to spread something. Hopes to graduate on E's.

name: Arturo C. Fernandez
description: Came from Monterey, Mexico, and started with the class of '15, but spent two years in his native land as an assayer and chemist. Has a fascinating manner that wins him many friends and is said to charm the ladies. Loves to "kid" the professors with easy questions.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Oi, Prof! That's not right."
Came from Monterey, Mexico, and started with the class of '15, but spent two years in his native land as an assayer and chemist. Has a fascinating manner that wins him many friends and is said to charm the ladies. Loves to "kid" the professors with easy questions.

name: Freudenberg, Walter H.
description: He spent a year in Butte but got back on the job and joined the class. With him it never rains. Has an open awe for "sharks" and "guns" and refuses to tease them. Takes keen delight in assisting the Frisco Express department. "Heh, fellows, has Dean called the roll?"
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He spent a year in Butte but got back on the job and joined the class. With him it never rains. Has an open awe for "sharks" and "guns" and refuses to tease them. Takes keen delight in assisting the Frisco Express department. "Heh, fellows, has Dean called the roll?"

name: Greenberg, David
description: He sometimes gets careless and only gets an "S" in a subject instead of his customary "E." Chief indoor pastime seems to be peeking through a telescope at the rocks in Petrography, although when it comes to the "manly art" he can handle his "dukes" to the consternation of much heavier opponents.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He sometimes gets careless and only gets an "S" in a subject instead of his customary "E." Chief indoor pastime seems to be peeking through a telescope at the rocks in Petrography, although when it comes to the "manly art" he can handle his "dukes" to the consternation of much heavier opponents.

name: William, Guest
description: He entered M. S. M. as a Senior, having attended the O. S. M. for three years. He tells weird tales regarding the high calorific power of the coal used in the assay lab at Wilburton. He was "wrinkled" so many times on circus day that he came near never being straightened out.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He entered M. S. M. as a Senior, having attended the O. S. M. for three years. He tells weird tales regarding the high calorific power of the coal used in the assay lab at Wilburton. He was "wrinkled" so many times on circus day that he came near never being straightened out.

name: Ramsey, C. Henschel
description: Ramsey is one of those fellows who keep their activities in the dark (or does them in the dark). Henschel is a "gun" in Mathematics and has been known to show up Garrett in Mechanics. His answers in Geology often bewilder and puzzle Dake. Makes occasional trips to Bourbon (name of a city, not of a beverage).
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Ramsey is one of those fellows who keep their activities in the dark (or does them in the dark). Henschel is a "gun" in Mathematics and has been known to show up Garrett in Mechanics. His answers in Geology often bewilder and puzzle Dake. Makes occasional trips to Bourbon (name of a city, not of a beverage).

name: Herivel, Harold T.
description: Has several very pronounced characteristics, not the least of which are his abilities at balling out the Profs and falling in love with attractive grass widows. Loves to go to Fort Wyman on "Friday" night. Still bears the marks of his period of rooming with Bock. Would be arrested if his opinion of Jim were to be made public.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Has several very pronounced characteristics, not the least of which are his abilities at balling out the Profs and falling in love with attractive grass widows. Loves to go to Fort Wyman on "Friday" night. Still bears the marks of his period of rooming with Bock. Would be arrested if his opinion of Jim were to be made public.

name: Hippard, Clemence W.
description: "Hip" upholds the honor of the Tau Betas and watches over the Y. M. C. A. with fatherly solicitude. Likes (?) to be called "Kluge" or "Clemence," and at such times expresses his ideas regarding the propriety of occasional murder. "Hip" fooled the boys this April by slipping off to Belleville and returning with a wife. Sleighbells?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Hip" upholds the honor of the Tau Betas and watches over the Y. M. C. A. with fatherly solicitude. Likes (?) to be called "Kluge" or "Clemence," and at such times expresses his ideas regarding the propriety of occasional murder. "Hip" fooled the boys this April by slipping off to Belleville and returning with a wife. Sleighbells?

name: Horner, Howard Andrew
motto: "Jack" is "all wool and a yard wide"—he is almost that wide.
description: He entered as a Junior, but at once fell into the spirit of doing things the M. S. M. way. He is actively associated with the Y. M. C. A. and edifies his flock with stories. He is Student Assistant in assaying, but says that his work around the furnaces is not preparing him for the next world. Amen!
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Jack" is "all wool and a yard wide"—he is almost that wide.
He entered as a Junior, but at once fell into the spirit of doing things the M. S. M. way. He is actively associated with the Y. M. C. A. and edifies his flock with stories. He is Student Assistant in assaying, but says that his work around the furnaces is not preparing him for the next world. Amen!

name: Heimberger, Karl William
motto: "Kilowatt" is the noise machine of the school.
description: He has more kinds of noises per pound of avoirdupois than any six zoos in captivity. He is a native of the Ozarks and says that he expects to remain here as long as the residents will stand for him. His mainstay in the line of studies is Freshman chemistry, which he takes every year just to keep in practice.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Kilowatt" is the noise machine of the school.
He has more kinds of noises per pound of avoirdupois than any six zoos in captivity. He is a native of the Ozarks and says that he expects to remain here as long as the residents will stand for him. His mainstay in the line of studies is Freshman chemistry, which he takes every year just to keep in practice.

name: James, Floyd Dixie
description: James is the learned man of the class. Supposed to be a shark in the metallurgy of zinc. Has a habit of "killing" exams. Entered school with the class of '16, but remained out last year to get some practical experience. Annoys Thornie by hanging around the Experiment Station and getting in the way.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: James is the learned man of the class. Supposed to be a shark in the metallurgy of zinc. Has a habit of "killing" exams. Entered school with the class of '16, but remained out last year to get some practical experience. Annoys Thornie by hanging around the Experiment Station and getting in the way.

name: Kluge, Harry Albert
description: Harry claims that he is human, although he comes from Collinsville, Ill. Is often angered by being hailed as Hippard. Answers to the roll call, "Kloogah?" "Heeerr!" Hopes to imitate Clem Hippard.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Harry claims that he is human, although he comes from Collinsville, Ill. Is often angered by being hailed as Hippard. Answers to the roll call, "Kloogah?" "Heeerr!" Hopes to imitate Clem Hippard.

name: Kaplan, Louis
description: Kaplan is so quiet that he has never received a nickname. However, some of his actions do not go unnoticed. Ask him about those caps and gowns that he ordered for St. Patrick's Day. Loves to impress the professors or to argue on any subject.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Kaplan is so quiet that he has never received a nickname. However, some of his actions do not go unnoticed. Ask him about those caps and gowns that he ordered for St. Patrick's Day. Loves to impress the professors or to argue on any subject.

name: Kahlbaum, William
hometown: St. Louis (South St. Louis, we bet)
description: "Bill" is one of those bully good fellows that you seldom find a duplicate for. He comes from St. Louis (South St. Louis, we bet). "Bill" hates to let his books interfere with his college education. He would be even more popular if he did not help Fred Lane to use up the boys' contingent fees. He usually steps out at night in his "tin Henry" to see the ladies.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bill" is one of those bully good fellows that you seldom find a duplicate for. He comes from St. Louis (South St. Louis, we bet). "Bill" hates to let his books interfere with his college education. He would be even more popular if he did not help Fred Lane to use up the boys' contingent fees. He usually steps out at night in his "tin Henry" to see the ladies.

name: Lesniak, Stanislaw W.
description: Count came to M. S. M. from the old country and soon copped all the A's and E's that the Faculty could spare. He finished in January and took a position in Utah. Count distinguished himself as a talker at a little banquet given in his honor last semester.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Count came to M. S. M. from the old country and soon copped all the A's and E's that the Faculty could spare. He finished in January and took a position in Utah. Count distinguished himself as a talker at a little banquet given in his honor last semester.

name: Lucky, Maurice Cecil
description: Lucky's only handicap is his name. Despite his cognomen, he continually loses in the games of tiddlywinks and poker. He is going to school to get a sheepskin, as he believes that he can get more money when he can officially put B.S. after his name. Was recently sued by Strobach for seventeen cents. At present, Dake's chief assistant in Geology and Mineralogy.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Lucky's only handicap is his name. Despite his cognomen, he continually loses in the games of tiddlywinks and poker. He is going to school to get a sheepskin, as he believes that he can get more money when he can officially put B.S. after his name. Was recently sued by Strobach for seventeen cents. At present, Dake's chief assistant in Geology and Mineralogy.

name: Lyons, Robert Paul
description: Quo Vadis, Mucker. When he arrived in Rolla he was one of the quietest chaps that ever came from a Prep school, but four years at M. S. M. and a summer at Butte, Mont., broadened his views very greatly. Likes to take long walks, especially between St. James and Rolla. Made his "M" in football. Quite a consistent fusser, and loves to orate at mass meetings.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Quo Vadis, Mucker. When he arrived in Rolla he was one of the quietest chaps that ever came from a Prep school, but four years at M. S. M. and a summer at Butte, Mont., broadened his views very greatly. Likes to take long walks, especially between St. James and Rolla. Made his "M" in football. Quite a consistent fusser, and loves to orate at mass meetings.

name: Muehlberg, Clarence E.
description: Came to Rolla from Washington U. to help Prof. Dickerson reorganize M. S. M., particularly the new mechanical department. Delights in getting his overalls well sprinkled with oil in power plant. Defends South St. Louis. Is a shark in anything that looks or smells like steam.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Came to Rolla from Washington U. to help Prof. Dickerson reorganize M. S. M., particularly the new mechanical department. Delights in getting his overalls well sprinkled with oil in power plant. Defends South St. Louis. Is a shark in anything that looks or smells like steam.

name: Nevin, James Raymond
description: He is father of all Freshmen and never fails to take some of them to the Phelps County Fair. For the past two years "Ole" has been the backbone of the football and basketball teams. Made letters in both. "Ole" was acting captain in football after Imlay was injured.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is father of all Freshmen and never fails to take some of them to the Phelps County Fair. For the past two years "Ole" has been the backbone of the football and basketball teams. Made letters in both. "Ole" was acting captain in football after Imlay was injured.

name: Pape, Paul Frederick
description: His stories about attending Business College in St. Louis are his long suit. About Flat River he established quite a reputation as a "fusser," but never demonstrated it here. He has been a good steady worker and always "delivered the goods."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: His stories about attending Business College in St. Louis are his long suit. About Flat River he established quite a reputation as a "fusser," but never demonstrated it here. He has been a good steady worker and always "delivered the goods."

name: Peterson, Carl Alden
description: Although Pete is said to be very forgetful, he never forgets how to break records in track work. Made his "M" in both basketball and track. He is known to have lost two suitcases of "beans" somewhere between the K. A. house and the depot. In Power Plant, he is Prof. Dickerson's right-hand man.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Although Pete is said to be very forgetful, he never forgets how to break records in track work. Made his "M" in both basketball and track. He is known to have lost two suitcases of "beans" somewhere between the K. A. house and the depot. In Power Plant, he is Prof. Dickerson's right-hand man.

name: Raible, Joseph C., Jr.
description: "Doc" has never let his studies interfere with his college education. He is very fond of Butte, Mont. He has plenty of "college spirit," and has been a consistent worker in school activities. Is a "social lion" and has a "failing" for the ladies. "M" in football and baseball.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Doc" has never let his studies interfere with his college education. He is very fond of Butte, Mont. He has plenty of "college spirit," and has been a consistent worker in school activities. Is a "social lion" and has a "failing" for the ladies. "M" in football and baseball.

name: Reilly, John H. G.
description: As a natural born executive demonstrated his ability while president of the Junior Class '17. He did justice to Saint Patrick by impersonating him on St. Pat's Day, 1916. He had been an erratic "fusser" until his chief rival left for Bisbee, Ariz. Is noted for his reckless automobile driving. Helped to train the fellows for engineers' corps.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: As a natural born executive demonstrated his ability while president of the Junior Class '17. He did justice to Saint Patrick by impersonating him on St. Pat's Day, 1916. He had been an erratic "fusser" until his chief rival left for Bisbee, Ariz. Is noted for his reckless automobile driving. Helped to train the fellows for engineers' corps.

name: Scheurer, Leroy Robert
description: "Tex" is fast making Wichita Falls, Texas, a famous place by knocking off Prof. Mann in telling about "Hurley" methods. Is an all-around good scout, but like Clem H., he needs watching, as fussing has always been his weakness. Tries to compete with Frank Scott occasionally.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Tex" is fast making Wichita Falls, Texas, a famous place by knocking off Prof. Mann in telling about "Hurley" methods. Is an all-around good scout, but like Clem H., he needs watching, as fussing has always been his weakness. Tries to compete with Frank Scott occasionally.

name: Schierneyer, Harry J.
description: Besides chaperoning the Y. M. C. A. and restraining his fellow officers, Harry manages to attend to the library and incidentally to go to school. Attempted to raise a mustache during the early part of his Senior year. "I beg your pardon; are you a Freshman? Have a handbook."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Besides chaperoning the Y. M. C. A. and restraining his fellow officers, Harry manages to attend to the library and incidentally to go to school. Attempted to raise a mustache during the early part of his Senior year. "I beg your pardon; are you a Freshman? Have a handbook."

name: Shayes, Frederick Pine
description: Shayes hails from Rochester, N. Y., but dreams of toting huge revolvers. Will conclusively argue on either or both sides of any question. Chief indoor sport is taking Petrography. Started as civil engineer, switched to metallurgy, and finally got around to mining.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Shayes hails from Rochester, N. Y., but dreams of toting huge revolvers. Will conclusively argue on either or both sides of any question. Chief indoor sport is taking Petrography. Started as civil engineer, switched to metallurgy, and finally got around to mining.

name: Shipley, John Joshua
description: "Ship" is all there when it comes to work and leads "Woodrow" and Teas a merry chase. Has often been known to fuss and made a particular hit in "Bricks and Barons." Chief supporter of sundial—see snapshot.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Ship" is all there when it comes to work and leads "Woodrow" and Teas a merry chase. Has often been known to fuss and made a particular hit in "Bricks and Barons." Chief supporter of sundial—see snapshot.

name: Shriver, Ray Otto
description: "Duke" is the original shark when it comes to grades and is also a gun in athletics, making his letter in football. Has had much practical experience, and is at the present time running the Civil Engineering department.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Duke" is the original shark when it comes to grades and is also a gun in athletics, making his letter in football. Has had much practical experience, and is at the present time running the Civil Engineering department.

name: Teas, Howard Jones
description: After stumping the professor in civil engineering, Harvey retires for solace to his suburban home. Blushes nicely, but once refused to come under the mistletoe. Expects to become a member of the Benedicts' club in the near future. Harvey is a diligent student, and will undoubtedly attain success in the engineering profession.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: After stumping the professor in civil engineering, Harvey retires for solace to his suburban home. Blushes nicely, but once refused to come under the mistletoe. Expects to become a member of the Benedicts' club in the near future. Harvey is a diligent student, and will undoubtedly attain success in the engineering profession.

name: Walsh, John Kennedy
major: Mining Engineering, A.B., St. Louis University, '14
clubs: Associate Editor of the Missouri Miner
Author of famous tirades against the faculty, "What's Wrong with M. S. M.?"
description: "Jake" is truly Irish, although coming from South St. Louis, and is supremely happy when allowed to engineer mass meetings and make speeches. "Honorable Faculty, and gentlemen."
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Jake" is truly Irish, although coming from South St. Louis, and is supremely happy when allowed to engineer mass meetings and make speeches. "Honorable Faculty, and gentlemen."

name: Walsh, Thomas P. F.
clubs: Order of I. K. K., Prospector
Metallurgical Society (Chief instigator and first president)
Newspaper work (Senior Class reporter and Editor-elect of '18 Miner)
description: T. P. F. hails from old St. Joe town and vigorously denies relationship with J. K. Is known as an English shark, and has been assistant instructor in this department for two years. Also indulges in newspaper work.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: T. P. F. hails from old St. Joe town and vigorously denies relationship with J. K. Is known as an English shark, and has been assistant instructor in this department for two years. Also indulges in newspaper work.

name: Weimer, Earl Joseph
description: When it comes to rivaling an encyclopedia or making the Profs jealous, Weimer is on the job. Attends class merely out of courtesy to the Faculty. Resembles Falstaff from a profile view. Is a good scout and one of the "guns." Loves to keep an eye on Freudenberg, especially on "Friday" night.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: When it comes to rivaling an encyclopedia or making the Profs jealous, Weimer is on the job. Attends class merely out of courtesy to the Faculty. Resembles Falstaff from a profile view. Is a good scout and one of the "guns." Loves to keep an eye on Freudenberg, especially on "Friday" night.

name: Wilson, George Baldwin
description: "Woodrow" is a home product of the Ozarks and one of the Major's sharks in Masonry. Has been seen with a female but vigorously denies it. All-around good scout and will make a first class engineer where strict attention to duty is required.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Woodrow" is a home product of the Ozarks and one of the Major's sharks in Masonry. Has been seen with a female but vigorously denies it. All-around good scout and will make a first class engineer where strict attention to duty is required.
